3221860.name: The Late Arrival
3221860.description:
Game Overview:

PC based Horror game that uses the keyboard and mouse to move the player through the abandoned subway station. Game includes puzzles, challenges, and scares. The player will learn how to interact with the environment including graffiti painting, moving objects, opening doors, and finding hidden keys. The game is based on the Unreal Engine Horror Engine expanded into a completed creator based environment. Many assets used were free assets from the UE store.
3221860.supported_languages:

*具有完全音频支持的语言
